title: [MTR4] Iarnród Éireann 201 Class
description: Iarnród Éireann 201 Class for MTR mod!
body:
# Iarnród Éireann 201 Class
![Banner image for Iarnród Éireann 201 Class, featuring 2 of the liveries available in the resource pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ea37ff066302bc3237b7fe30b3ef8af7c10acf1.png)
This resource pack includes the Iarnród Éireann 201 Class locomotive!
## Features
- The train
- Custom BVE sound
